# Apify Actor Powerhouse

> Buyer-facing workflow hub for Apify Actors that package recurring business data into reports, monitoring checks, proof quotes, and action queues.

## Workflows

- [Use cases by buyer job](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/use-cases.html): Search-focused entry points for GEO reporting, AI search monitoring, review response queues, marketplace review actions, and competitor battlecards.
- [Workflow blueprints](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/workflow-blueprints.html): Platform-neutral JSON blueprints for weekly AI visibility, review intelligence, supplier shortlist, and job-board account-signal jobs.
- [RSS feed](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/feed.xml) and [JSON feed](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/feed.json): Public hub update feeds for workflow pages, Actor pages, and comparison guides.
- [Workflow feedback](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/feedback.html): Public channel for sample-run requests and first-run friction, routed by workflow family.
- [AI visibility workflow](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-visibility.html): Monitor AI answer visibility, competitor mentions, citations, and report gaps.
- [AI Brand Monitor demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-brand-monitor-demo.html): First-run path for collecting brand-query-model visibility checks.
- [AI Brand Monitor proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/ai-brand-monitor-proof.gif): Visual proof path from buyer prompt to competitor gap and content action.
- [Supplier Intelligence demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/supplier-intelligence-demo.html): First-run path for turning supplier records into sourcing scores and actions.
- [Supplier Intelligence proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/supplier-intelligence-proof.gif): Visual proof path from supplier records to a prioritized sourcing shortlist.
- [Public Hiring Signal demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/public-hiring-signal-demo.html): First-run path for turning public job records into account-priority signals.
- [Public Hiring Signal proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/public-hiring-signal-proof.gif): Visual proof path from public hiring records to GTM account actions.
- [AI visibility report demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-visibility-report-demo.html): First-run sample for turning visibility checks into a client-ready report.
- [AI visibility sample report](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-visibility-report-sample.html): Rendered Northstar CRM REPORT.md sample from the same input used by the demo.
- [Review intelligence workflow](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/review-intelligence.html): Turn review exports into themes, response queues, proof quotes, and battlecard snippets.
- [Local Review proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/local-review-proof.gif): Visual proof path from local-business reviews to response and proof-quote queues.
- [Google Maps review tutorial](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/google-maps-review-tutorial.html): First-run path for local review analysis.
- [Google Maps review proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/google-maps-review-proof.gif): Visual proof path from Google Maps reviews to local response queue.
- [Trustpilot review proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/trustpilot-review-proof.gif): Visual proof path from Trustpilot reviews to reputation queue.
- [Amazon review tutorial](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/amazon-review-tutorial.html): First-run path for marketplace review analysis.
- [Amazon review proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/amazon-review-proof.gif): Visual proof path from Amazon reviews to marketplace action queue.
- [G2 review battlecard demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/g2-review-battlecard-demo.html): First-run path for B2B review battlecards.
- [G2 battlecard proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/g2-review-battlecard-proof.gif): Visual proof path from reviews to battlecard row.
- [B2B competitor battlecard demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/b2b-competitor-battlecard-demo.html): First-run path for mixed B2B competitor review battlecards.
- [B2B competitor battlecard proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/b2b-competitor-battlecard-proof.gif): Visual proof path from mixed reviews to objection-handling row.
- [Capterra review battlecard demo](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/capterra-review-battlecard-demo.html): First-run path for Capterra competitor review battlecards.
- [Capterra battlecard proof GIF](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/assets/capterra-review-battlecard-proof.gif): Visual proof path from Capterra reviews to battlecard row.

## Workflow Blueprint Files

- [AI visibility weekly brief blueprint JSON](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/templates/ai-visibility-weekly-brief.blueprint.json): Public JSON template for weekly AI visibility monitoring jobs with relative Store handoff paths.
- [Review intelligence action queue blueprint JSON](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/templates/review-intelligence-action-queue.blueprint.json): Public JSON template for turning review exports into response queues, proof quotes, and battlecards.
- [Supplier shortlist triage blueprint JSON](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/templates/supplier-shortlist-triage.blueprint.json): Public JSON template for ranking supplier records into sourcing shortlists and next actions.
- [Job-board account signals blueprint JSON](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/templates/job-board-account-signals.blueprint.json): Public JSON template for turning public hiring records into account-priority signals.

## Use Cases

- [GEO Client Reporting Workflow](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/geo-client-reporting.html): A first-run workflow for SEO and GEO agencies that need repeatable AI visibility scorecards, competitor mentions, and client-ready reporting.
- [AI Answer Competitor Gap Workflow](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-answer-competitor-gap.html): A first-run workflow for B2B SaaS content teams and GEO agencies that need to turn competitor mentions in AI answers into specific publishing actions.
- [AI Search Visibility Monitoring](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-search-visibility-monitoring.html): A small Apify workflow for B2B SaaS marketing teams that need to monitor AI answer mentions, competitor presence, citation gaps, and publishing actions.
- [Review Scraper Action Queue](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/review-scraper-action-queue.html): A first-run workflow for teams already collecting public reviews with Apify scrapers and needing theme tags, response priorities, proof quotes, and owner-ready follow-up rows.
- [Local Review Response Queue](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/local-review-response-queue.html): A first-run workflow for local SEO agencies and reputation managers that need review themes, owner-response drafts, proof quotes, and client-report actions.
- [Marketplace Review Action Queue](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/marketplace-review-actions.html): A first-run workflow for ecommerce teams and agencies that need to turn Amazon reviews into quality fixes, listing improvements, seller-response tasks, and proof quotes.
- [Competitor Review Battlecards](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/competitor-review-battlecards.html): A first-run workflow for product marketing and sales enablement teams that need competitor objections, proof quotes, switching-risk themes, and fresh battlecard rows.
- [Review Proof Quote Mining](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/review-proof-quote-mining.html): A first-run workflow for marketers and agencies that need to turn public reviews into reusable proof quotes, objection language, and weekly content actions.
- [Supplier Shortlist Intelligence](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/supplier-shortlist-intelligence.html): A first-run workflow for sourcing teams that need to score supplier profiles, spot capability gaps, and decide which records deserve outreach or verification.
- [Job Board Account Signals](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/job-board-account-signals.html): A first-run workflow for sales and RevOps teams that need to turn public hiring data into account actions, department signals, seniority clues, and weekly CRM updates.

## Actors

- [AI Brand Visibility Monitor - GEO & AI Search Tracker](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/ai-brand-visibility-monitor.html): AI visibility Actor for SEO agencies, GEO/AEO consultants, brand marketers, B2B SaaS marketing teams.
- [AI Visibility Report Generator](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/ai-visibility-report-generator.html): AI visibility Actor for Agencies, GEO/AEO consultants, client-facing marketing teams.
- [Google Maps Review Intelligence Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/google-maps-review-intelligence-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Local SEO agencies, reputation managers, franchises, multi-location operators.
- [Trustpilot Review Intelligence Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/trustpilot-review-intelligence-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Brand marketers, reputation managers, ecommerce operators, support leaders.
- [Amazon Review Intelligence Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/amazon-review-intelligence-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Ecommerce sellers, marketplace operators, agencies, product teams.
- [G2 Review Battlecard Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/g2-review-battlecard-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Product marketing, sales enablement, competitive intelligence teams, RevOps.
- [Capterra Review Battlecard Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/capterra-review-battlecard-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Product marketing, sales enablement, competitive intelligence teams, agencies.
- [Local Review Intelligence Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/local-review-intelligence-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for Local SEO agencies, reputation managers, franchises, multi-location operators.
- [B2B Competitor Review Battlecard Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/b2b-competitor-review-battlecard-monitor.html): Review intelligence Actor for B2B SaaS product marketing, sales enablement, RevOps, agencies.
- [Supplier Intelligence Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/supplier-intelligence-monitor.html): Supplier intelligence Actor for Procurement teams, importers, Amazon sellers, industrial sales teams, sourcing agencies.
- [Public Hiring Signal Monitor](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/actors/public-hiring-signal-monitor.html): Hiring signals Actor for Sales teams, RevOps, recruiters, agencies, ABM teams.

## Comparison Pages

- [AI Visibility Report Generator alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-visibility-report-generator-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `AI visibility report generator`.
- [G2 Review Battlecard Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/g2-review-battlecard-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `G2 review battlecard`.
- [B2B Competitor Review Battlecard Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/b2b-competitor-review-battlecard-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `B2B competitor review battlecard`.
- [AI Brand Visibility Monitor - GEO & AI Search Tracker alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/ai-brand-visibility-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `AI brand visibility monitor`.
- [Trustpilot Review Intelligence Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/trustpilot-review-intelligence-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `Trustpilot review monitor`.
- [Public Hiring Signal Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/public-hiring-signal-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `public hiring signal`.
- [Local Review Intelligence Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/local-review-intelligence-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `local review intelligence`.
- [Supplier Intelligence Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/supplier-intelligence-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `supplier intelligence monitor`.
- [Capterra Review Battlecard Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/capterra-review-battlecard-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `Capterra review battlecard`.
- [Amazon Review Intelligence Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/amazon-review-intelligence-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `Amazon review intelligence`.
- [Google Maps Review Intelligence Monitor alternatives](https://geneiusk.github.io/apify-actor-powerhouse-hub/google-maps-review-intelligence-monitor-alternatives.html): compare buyer workflow fit for `Google Maps review intelligence`.
